subject: Fix mode switching and model selection visibility issues
body:
Fixed two critical bugs:
1. Replaced unsupported :has() CSS selector with getElementById for better browser compatibility (especially for GitHub Pages)
2. Fixed mode switching to properly show/hide model selection and delivery/service sections when switching between modes

Changes:
- Added id="categorySection" to category div in index.html
- Updated setCalculatorMode() to use getElementById instead of querySelector with :has()
- Added logic to show modelSelectionSection and layerTwoThreeSection when switching to non-admin modes
- Removed unnecessary null checks now that getElementById is used

This fixes the issue where models wouldn't appear after selecting a software type and mode switching wouldn't work properly.
title: Fix mode switching and model selection visibility issues
